_doc.name: Lohagarh Desert Resort

highlights.description: Lohagarh Desert Resort Jaisalmer makes every stay leave behind quiet memories such as long walks on the sand, simple yet delicious meals, conversations you had alongside by the fire and the view of clear skies at night. The luxury desert resort near Jaisalmer offers an experience that is honest, calm and deeply connected to the desert regardless of what you are here for.

_doc.description:
The Thar Desert has its own rhythm—slow mornings, quiet afternoons, and nights filled with stars. Lohagarh Desert Resort Jaisalmer is created for travelers who want to feel that rhythm, not rush through it. Located about 39 km from the city, this desert resort near Jaisalmer sits among open dunes, far enough to feel peaceful but close enough to reach easily.

This is not the kind of place that feels crowded or overdone. At Lohagarh Desert Resort, the focus stays on comfort, warmth, and authenticity. Apart from that, you’ll notice it in the way guests are welcomed, in the food that’s served, and in the calm that settles in once the sun goes down. As a luxury desert resort in Jaisalmer, it keeps things simple while still offering everything you need for a comfortable stay.

salesContact.address: Lohagarh Desert Resort, Barna Village Khuri, Jaisalmer, Rajasthan 345034

airportTransport.name: Jaisalmer Airport (JSA)
airportTransport.note: Daily flights from New Delhi and Mumbai to Agra.

railTransport.name: Jaisalmer Railway Station (JSM)
railTransport.note: Convenient daily and overnight trains from New Delhi; Weekly/overnight from Mumbai and Udaipur.

surfaceTransport.note: Air-conditioned coaches from New Delhi, Mumbai, Ahmedabad, Jodhpur, and Udaipur

checkInPolicy.note: If you wish to extend your stay, subject to availability of room, you will be charged 25% the normal room tariff till 2 pm; 50% from 2 pm to 6 pm; and 100 % after 6 pm.

cancellationPolicy.description: Booking will be considered confirmed on receipt of 100% advance of the total reservation amount. Cancellation must be received... at least 7 days before scheduled date (Apr-Sept) and 30 days (Oct-Mar).

dining.heading: Culinary Heritage
dining.content: Indulge in an exquisite culinary journey at Lohagarh Fort Resort. Our restaurants offer a curated selection of authentic Rajasthani cuisine, pan-Indian delicacies, and international flavors prepared by our award-winning chefs using locally sourced ingredients and age-old royal recipes.

cards.title: Royal Dining Hall
cards.content: A regal setting for an unforgettable dining experience with traditional Rajasthani thali and more.

cards.title: Poolside Kitchen
cards.content: Casual dining by the pool with grills, kebabs, and refreshing beverages under the open sky.

spa&salon.title: Wellness & Rejuvenation
spa&salon.content: Immerse yourself in ancient Ayurvedic healing traditions at our spa. Our expert therapists blend traditional techniques with modern wellness practices to rejuvenate your body, mind, and soul.

photo-gallery.content: Explore the beauty and grandeur of Lohagarh Fort Resort through our curated photo gallery.

contact-us.description: We would love to hear from you. Reach out to us for reservations, inquiries, or any assistance you may need.

reviews.name: Rajesh Sharma
reviews.description: An absolutely magnificent experience. The heritage architecture combined with modern luxury made our stay unforgettable.

offers.title: Special Offers & Packages
offers.description: Take advantage of our exclusive offers and make your stay at Lohagarh Fort Resort even more memorable.

cards.description: Book 30 days in advance and save up to 25% on your stay.
cards.heading: Early Bird Special

wedding-venues.title: Celebrate in Royal Splendor
wedding-venues.description: Host your dream wedding at Lohagarh Fort Resort. Our magnificent venues provide the perfect setting for every ceremony, from intimate gatherings to grand celebrations.

cards.title: The Grand Courtyard
cards.description: An expansive open-air courtyard set against the backdrop of historic fort walls, perfect for grand celebrations.

cards.title: Royal Banquet Hall
cards.description: An elegant indoor venue adorned with traditional Rajasthani artwork and crystal chandeliers.

cards.title: Poolside Lawns
cards.description: Lush green lawns surrounding the pool area, ideal for evening cocktails and mehendi ceremonies.

royal-wedding.title: A Wedding Fit for Royalty
royal-wedding.description: Let us craft a wedding celebration that echoes the grandeur of Rajasthani royalty. From the majestic baraat procession to the intimate pheras ceremony, every moment is choreographed to perfection at Lohagarh Fort Resort.

cards.title: Royal Baraat
cards.description: Grand procession with decorated elephants, horses, and traditional band.

cards.title: Mandap Ceremony
cards.description: Beautifully decorated mandap with floral arrangements and heritage elements.

cards.title: Mehendi & Sangeet
cards.description: Vibrant celebrations with live music, dance, and traditional rituals.

cards.title: Royal Feast
cards.description: Multi-course banquet featuring authentic Rajasthani and pan-Indian cuisine.

explore.description: Beyond the walls of Lohagarh Fort Resort, a world of heritage, culture, and natural beauty awaits. Explore the best that Jaipur has to offer.

cards.title: Jaipur City Palace
cards.description: A magnificent blend of Rajasthani and Mughal architecture.

classification.title: Classification & Standards
classification.description: Lohagarh Fort Resort is classified as a premium heritage property, meeting the highest standards of luxury hospitality as set by the Ministry of Tourism, Government of India.

cards.title: 5-Star Heritage
cards.description: Classified heritage property

cards.title: FHRAI Approved
cards.description: Federation of Hotel & Restaurant Associations

cards.title: Safety Certified
cards.description: Meets all safety and hygiene standards

factSheet.title: At a Glance
factSheet.description: Everything you need to know about Lohagarh Fort Resort at a glance.

testimonials.name: Divyanshu Agarwal
testimonials.description: Amazing stay and truly appreciate the dedication of Mr. Arvind for his mind blowing hospitality, beyond expectation.

testimonials.name: Tanishka Thakur
testimonials.description: Very nice place, the experience was very good!!
